# merge(_:)

**Instance Method**

Merge another object of this type into this object.

## Declaration

```swift
@discardableResult mutating func merge(_ other: AssignableDocument) async throws -> Bool
```

## Parameters

- **other**: The other object to merge into this one.

## Return Value

`true`, if the merge caused a mutation.

## Merging the parts

- **merge(partData:into:)**: Merges an individual part into the specified part of this object.
- **merge(other:)**: Merge another object of this type into this object.
- **merge(partID:partDataURL:)**: Merges an individual part’s data into the specified part of this object.
